description_long: This internet cafe is a compact, modern room with sleek black and white walls and a light wood floor. The main feature is a long, black desk equipped with three curved monitors, a keyboard, mouse, and a high-backed gaming chair, suggesting a focus on gaming or high-performance computing. The back wall is decorated with geometric hexagonal shelves and LED accent lighting, while the side walls are fitted with large, wall-mounted speakers and additional shelving. The space is enclosed on three sides, creating a private, immersive environment, and the lighting includes red LED strips along the floor and ceiling edges. The overall design is minimalist yet high-tech, with a strong emphasis on comfort and audiovisual experience.
description: A modern, enclosed internet cafe room with a gaming setup, geometric wall decor, and LED accent lighting. Features a long desk, multiple monitors, and a high-backed chair in a sleek, minimalist environment.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main gaming station with three monitors, a keyboard, mouse, and a high-backed chair, as well as hexagonal wall shelves and LED lighting.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the large wall-mounted speakers, the back of the chair, and the full width of the desk with its equipment.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the decorative hexagonal shelves and the clean, uninterrupted wall surface, with minimal furniture visible.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the plain exterior wall with a single geometric accent, showing no interior details.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Three computer stations are visible, arranged side by side on a long desk, each with its own monitor and peripherals.
attribute_neon_lighting: Red LED strip lighting is visible along the floor and ceiling edges, providing accent illumination in a modern style.
